Uses of Class
neqsim.process.operations.OperationalScenario

Packages that use OperationalScenario
Package
Description
neqsim.mcp.runners
 
neqsim.process.operations
Operational study helpers that connect P&ID semantics, plant data, automation addresses, and NeqSim process simulations.

    Description

    Builds an operational scenario from JSON actions.

    Builds one operational scenario from a JSON object.
